title: <div><font face="ZapfDingbatsITC">✔</font> Students submit a brief (150-word) re
content:
✔ Students submit a brief (150-word) reflection at the end of each week.
✔ Instructor uses this feedback to refine class structure.

✅ Why This Works:
• Provides real-time student feedback.
• Encourages metacognition & personal assessment.
• Allows continuous course optimization.

8️⃣ Where Should the “Sign & Signifier” Lecture Go?

✔ Best placement: Week 1 or Week 3.
✔ Week 1: Establishes semiotic thinking early, but might be overwhelming.
✔ Week 3: Ties into political storytelling & how symbols create ideology.

🚀 Decision: Week 3 → The Power of the Symbol: Signs, Meaning, and Political Language

✅ Why This Works:
• Students will have some exposure to literary analysis first.
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 30 (chunk 30/555)
